introText:
The world has been cast into a haze of slimy gloom. 
Defeat the Slime Lord and return peace the the lands!

monsters.name: Slime King
monsters.winText: You have saved the kingdom. Oh, happy days!

npcs.name: Shadow Gard Smasher
npcs.dialogue: Must guard. sad. Lost yellow friend.

npcs.completeText: Me not good at guarding trinkets.
